mission.title: envoy: Allow healthchecks to be performed on another port
mission.description:
Please find a pull request to allow one to configure a specific port for the health checks.

fixes https://github.com/lyft/envoy/issues/439

resolution.summary:
This provides an alternative health check port, if set it allows an
upstream host to have different health check address port.

Ref: https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/issues/439

Signed-off-by: Dhi Aurrahman <dio@rockybars.com>
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
